title: Mathewsia matthioloides
taxonomy: Mathewsia matthioloides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It belongs to the genus Mathewsia. This plant is native to South America, specifically in the Andes mountains. Mathewsia matthioloides is a type of annual or perennial herb. The classification of Mathewsia matthioloides is further detailed in its taxonomic hierarchy, where it is placed within the order Ranunculales.
